SEARCH
Package io.vertigo.ui.core

Class ViewContext

java.lang.Object
io.vertigo.ui.core.ViewContext
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class ViewContext extends Object implements Serializable
Liste des couples (clé, object) enregistrés.
Author:
npiedeloup
See Also:
